name: Gerard Melie
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton male wearing an almost complete set of heavy armor - missing only the helmet. Wields a war axe.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: warrior, guard, loyal, vigilant, suspicious, devoted, doomed
Role: Gerard Melie is a warrior serving as a guard for his leader Roderick, who lies in a near-death state in Fort Sutch, northeast of Anvil near Lord Drad's Estate. He and his compatriots are devoted to protecting Roderick during his vulnerable condition, unaware that their efforts will ultimately prove futile. He carries a small amount of gold.
Home Location Information: Fort Sutch, northeast of Anvil near Lord Drad's Estate.
Daily Routine: Gerard maintains constant vigilance, guarding around the very first corner when entering through the eastern entrance. He watches over two gates - the large one leading to the main room and a smaller one next to the entrance. He never eats or sleeps, remaining on guard 24 hours a day. If someone picks the lock of the small gate, he becomes suspicious and extends his patrol area, following intruders through the tunnel into the large room. If he survives, he remains in Fort Sutch indefinitely, as hostile as ever.
Personality - The Devoted Sentinel: Gerard is vigilant and suspicious, taking his duty to guard Roderick very seriously. He's observant enough to notice when locks are picked and adapts his patrol pattern to counter potential threats. His unwavering dedication keeps him on guard constantly without rest, showing complete loyalty to his fallen leader despite the futility of their situation.
author: Bethesda
